text: one of the worst ways that the Universe
could end is called the Big Crunch what
would that look like if it happened
right now 13.8 billion years ago the
universe exploded from an infinitely
dense point of energy and ever since it
has been rapidly expanding faster than
the speed of light what if it were to
lose the momentum that it gained during
the Big Bang or stopped expanding
entirely this is where disaster would
strike without the vacuum of the
expanding Universe the gravity of all of
the objects inside of it galaxies black
holes planets Stars would all start
drifting towards each other as these
objects start to collide and merge
together their gravity increases and the
edges of the universe start getting
pulled backwards as the density of the
universe gets higher so does its
temperature and the entire universe
would start heating up to over 5,000 de
C everything inside of it would start to
get incinerated and burnt alive if
anything is still alive before the
universe triggers a reverse big bang and
everything is instantly crushed into one
dense point of energy
